title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses building two unicorns in 12 years and emphasizes focus and product differentiation over model size or presentation. His core principle is avoiding redundant problem-solving and focusing on gaps in existing solutions. The 2-year stealth mode period and disciplined scope management drove Glean's $7 billion valuation.
